TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_3EP-salunganay_tatayna, title = 3EP-salunganay_tatayna, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/3EP-salunganay_tatayna} }

S.FORM: 3EP-salunganay tatayna siwkay - angangan kalunasulitan: saayaway a nganan niza ci Zhou YoutingŚĎ®ŚĻľŚ©∑, ci Guo TingtingťÉ≠Ś©∑Ś©∑ atu ci Lin Weilingśěóťüčšľ∂. Amilika a ngangan niza, inayi' ku Amilika a ngangan. malimula' a ngangan niza , inayi' ku malimula a ngangan. u etul niza u tatana amin. nalecuhan, ci Zhou Youting 1977.6.10, ci Guo Tingting1978.11.4 atu ci Lin Weiling1980.2.1 . u kanatal kuheni sa, u ROC.Taywan. u cidekay kuheni sa, u Hulam. u kakawsan a enengan niza sa, kaaykatineng. u kulit nu banges niza sa, u takuliway. u kulit nu bukes niza sa, u lumeniay. u kawaw niza ayza sa, u palaway. u subana'ay niza sa, u tabakiay a cacudadan. kamu niza sa, u Hulam atu Amilika. - kawaw kalunasulitan: sadadiw kakuniza sa, u Hulam malikitay a dadiw. sadadiw sa, inayi'. patahkal a mihcan sa, 1998 a mihcan. patahkal a nalimaan sa, 3EP salungan tatayna a lais, natahkal i 1999.7.1. sakapahay a nalimaan sa, 3EP salungan tatayna a lais. tanitik a mihcan sa, u 1999 a mihcan. dadiw a kakawawan sa, u Gunse. mikuwanay a kakawawan sa, u Gunse. palaacawa niza sa, caayhenay. papazaan atu papayzaan niza sa, caaykatineng. takalaw niza sa, caaykatineng. baeked niza sa, caaykatineng. u kanamuhan niza sa,caaykatineng. - u nikauzip niza: Zhou Youting mipalaw i Binawlan Tilibi. Guo Tingting patahkal sakacacay a dadiw CD niza " u demec nu namuh" Lin Weiling mipalaw tu iga, maala ku kawlah ni iga, sakapahay baluhayay a tademaw nu iga, 2002 a mihcan tayza Korea mikawaw. - kakalimaan nazipa'an: - namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Apple-iTunes 3EPÁĺéŚįĎŚ•≥šĽčÁīĻÁ∂≤ť†Ā nasulitan nay pabalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1
S.PHON: *…ôp-sar~…ĺuŇčanaj tatajna siwkaj - aŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan: saajawaj a Ňčanan niza ¶i zńßou joutiŇč***, ¶i guo tiŇčtiŇč*** atu ¶i r~…ĺin w…ôir~…ĺiŇč***. amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan niza, inaji Ē~ ° ku amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan. mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan niza , inaji Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa a ŇčaŇčan. u …ôtur~…ĺ niza u tatana amin. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ¶i zńßou joutiŇč ****.*.**, ¶i guo tiŇčtiŇč****.**.* atu ¶i r~…ĺin w…ôir~…ĺiŇč****.*.* . u kanatar~…ĺ kuńß…ôni sa, u *o ¶.tajwan. u ¶id…ôkaj kuńß…ôni sa, u ńßur~…ĺam. u kakawsan a …ôn…ôŇčan niza sa, kaajkatin…ôŇč. u kur~…ĺit nu baŇč…ôs niza sa, u takur~…ĺiwaj. u kur~…ĺit nu buk…ôs niza sa, u r~…ĺum…ôniaj. u kawaw niza ajza sa, u par~…ĺawaj. u subana Ē~ °aj niza sa, u tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. kamu niza sa, u ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika. - kawaw kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan: sadadiw kakuniza sa, u ńßur~…ĺam mar~…ĺikitaj a dadiw. sadadiw sa, inaji Ē~ °. patańßkar~…ĺ a mińß ¶an sa, **** a mińß ¶an. patańßkar~…ĺ a nar~…ĺimaan sa, *…ôp sar~…ĺuŇčan tatajna a r~…ĺais, natańßkar~…ĺ i ****.*.*. sakapańßaj a nar~…ĺimaan sa, *…ôp sar~…ĺuŇčan tatajna a r~…ĺais. tanitik a mińß ¶an sa, u **** a mińß ¶an. dadiw a kakawawan sa, u guns…ô. mikuwanaj a kakawawan sa, u guns…ô. par~…ĺaa ¶awa niza sa, ¶aajńß…ônaj. papazaan atu papajzaan niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. takar~…ĺaw niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. ba…ôk…ôd niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. u kanamuńßan niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. - u nikauzip niza: zńßou joutiŇč mipar~…ĺaw i binawr~…ĺan tir~…ĺibi. guo tiŇčtiŇč patańßkar~…ĺ saka ¶a ¶aj a dadiw ¶d niza " u d…ôm…ô ¶ nu namuńß" r~…ĺin w…ôir~…ĺiŇč mipar~…ĺaw tu iga, maar~…ĺa ku kawr~…ĺańß ni iga, sakapańßaj bar~…ĺuńßajaj a tad…ômaw nu iga, **** a mińß ¶an tajza kor…ôa mikawaw. - kakar~…ĺimaan nazipa Ē~ °an: - namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan appr~…ĺ…ô-itun…ôs *…ôp******* nasur~…ĺitan naj pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu subana Ē~ °aj a pu ****-*
S.FORM: 3EP-salunganay tatayna siwkay - angangan kalunasulitan: saayaway a nganan niza ci Zhou YoutingŚĎ®ŚĻľŚ©∑, ci Guo TingtingťÉ≠Ś©∑Ś©∑ atu ci Lin Weilingśěóťüčšľ∂. Amilika a ngangan niza, inayi' ku Amilika a ngangan. malimula' a ngangan niza , inayi' ku malimula a ngangan. u etul niza u tatana amin. nalecuhan, ci Zhou Youting 1977.6.10, ci Guo Tingting1978.11.4 atu ci Lin Weiling1980.2.1 . u kanatal kuheni sa, u ROC.Taywan. u cidekay kuheni sa, u Hulam. u kakawsan a enengan niza sa, kaaykatineng. u kulit nu banges niza sa, u takuliway. u kulit nu bukes niza sa, u lumeniay. u kawaw niza ayza sa, u palaway. u subana'ay niza sa, u tabakiay a cacudadan. kamu niza sa, u Hulam atu Amilika. - kawaw kalunasulitan: sadadiw kakuniza sa, u Hulam malikitay a dadiw. sadadiw sa, inayi'. patahkal a mihcan sa, 1998 a mihcan. patahkal a nalimaan sa, 3EP salungan tatayna a lais, natahkal i 1999.7.1. sakapahay a nalimaan sa, 3EP salungan tatayna a lais. tanitik a mihcan sa, u 1999 a mihcan. dadiw a kakawawan sa, u Gunse. mikuwanay a kakawawan sa, u Gunse. palaacawa niza sa, caayhenay. papazaan atu papayzaan niza sa, caaykatineng. takalaw niza sa, caaykatineng. baeked niza sa, caaykatineng. u kanamuhan niza sa,caaykatineng. - u nikauzip niza: Zhou Youting mipalaw i Binawlan Tilibi. Guo Tingting patahkal sakacacay a dadiw CD niza " u demec nu namuh" Lin Weiling mipalaw tu iga, maala ku kawlah ni iga, sakapahay baluhayay a tademaw nu iga, 2002 a mihcan tayza Korea mikawaw. - kakalimaan nazipa'an: - namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Apple-iTunes 3EPÁĺéŚįĎŚ•≥šĽčÁīĻÁ∂≤ť†Ā nasulitan nay pabalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1
S.PHON: *…ôp-sar~…ĺuŇčanaj tatajna siwkaj - aŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan: saajawaj a Ňčanan niza ¶i zńßou joutiŇč***, ¶i guo tiŇčtiŇč*** atu ¶i r~…ĺin w…ôir~…ĺiŇč***. amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan niza, inaji Ē~ ° ku amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan. mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan niza , inaji Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa a ŇčaŇčan. u …ôtur~…ĺ niza u tatana amin. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ¶i zńßou joutiŇč ****.*.**, ¶i guo tiŇčtiŇč****.**.* atu ¶i r~…ĺin w…ôir~…ĺiŇč****.*.* . u kanatar~…ĺ kuńß…ôni sa, u *o ¶.tajwan. u ¶id…ôkaj kuńß…ôni sa, u ńßur~…ĺam. u kakawsan a …ôn…ôŇčan niza sa, kaajkatin…ôŇč. u kur~…ĺit nu baŇč…ôs niza sa, u takur~…ĺiwaj. u kur~…ĺit nu buk…ôs niza sa, u r~…ĺum…ôniaj. u kawaw niza ajza sa, u par~…ĺawaj. u subana Ē~ °aj niza sa, u tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. kamu niza sa, u ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika. - kawaw kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan: sadadiw kakuniza sa, u ńßur~…ĺam mar~…ĺikitaj a dadiw. sadadiw sa, inaji Ē~ °. patańßkar~…ĺ a mińß ¶an sa, **** a mińß ¶an. patańßkar~…ĺ a nar~…ĺimaan sa, *…ôp sar~…ĺuŇčan tatajna a r~…ĺais, natańßkar~…ĺ i ****.*.*. sakapańßaj a nar~…ĺimaan sa, *…ôp sar~…ĺuŇčan tatajna a r~…ĺais. tanitik a mińß ¶an sa, u **** a mińß ¶an. dadiw a kakawawan sa, u guns…ô. mikuwanaj a kakawawan sa, u guns…ô. par~…ĺaa ¶awa niza sa, ¶aajńß…ônaj. papazaan atu papajzaan niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. takar~…ĺaw niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. ba…ôk…ôd niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. u kanamuńßan niza sa, ¶aajkatin…ôŇč. - u nikauzip niza: zńßou joutiŇč mipar~…ĺaw i binawr~…ĺan tir~…ĺibi. guo tiŇčtiŇč patańßkar~…ĺ saka ¶a ¶aj a dadiw ¶d niza " u d…ôm…ô ¶ nu namuńß" r~…ĺin w…ôir~…ĺiŇč mipar~…ĺaw tu iga, maar~…ĺa ku kawr~…ĺańß ni iga, sakapańßaj bar~…ĺuńßajaj a tad…ômaw nu iga, **** a mińß ¶an tajza kor…ôa mikawaw. - kakar~…ĺimaan nazipa Ē~ °an: - namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan appr~…ĺ…ô-itun…ôs *…ôp******* nasur~…ĺitan naj pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu subana Ē~ °aj a pu ****-*
